name: central-stadium-360
description: Central Stadium 360 — 360° multi-angle live stadium streaming platform

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n FE,ADM,BE -c magenta,yellow,cyan "pnpm --filter @cs360/frontend dev" "pnpm --filter @cs360/frontend dev:admin" "pnpm --filter @cs360/backend dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @cs360/shared build && pnpm --filter @cs360/frontend build && pnpm --filter @cs360/backend build
